title: IISER Pune Project Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
organization: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Pune
short_info: IISER Pune is recruiting 1 Project Research Scientist-II post on a temporary & contractual basis under ICMR funded project.

important_dates.reporting time: 10:00 AM (Candidates reporting after 10:30 AM will not be considered)
important_dates.venue: Seminar Room No. 33, Main Building, IISER Pune

age_limit.details: Not more than 40 years as on the last date of application. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates having higher qualification and/or experience with the prior approval of the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry or related areas with minimum 3 years of Post-Doctoral experience.

selection_process: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview. Candidates must bring duly filled application form along with all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies.
how_to_apply: Candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview on 09 June 2026 at the given venue. Download the application form from the official IISER Pune website and fill it carefully. Bring all required documents as mentioned above.
Venue: Seminar Room No.33, Main Building, IISER Pune
important_instructions: The appointment is purely temporary and contractual. It will automatically terminate upon completion of the project. No claim for regular appointment or absorption in IISER Pune or ICMR. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Selected candidates must join immediately.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no last date for online application. Eligible candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview on 09 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Research Scientist-II at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 67,000/- per month + 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA)

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for IISER Pune Project Research Scientist-II?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Ph.D. in Organic Chemistry or related areas with minimum 3 years of Post-Doctoral experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum age should not exceed 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at Seminar Room No.33, Main Building, IISER Pune.

faq.question: Q6. Is prior registration or online application required?
faq.answer: No online application is required. Candidates have to directly appear for the walk-in interview with all documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the IISER Pune Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Duly filled application form, educational certificates, experience certificates, photo ID proof, and passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to bring for the IISER Pune Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring a duly filled application form, original documents + one set of self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, date of birth proof, government-issued photo ID, and one recent passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for IISER Pune Project Research Scientist-II Recruitment
faq.answer: No application fee is required. Candidates can directly appear for the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job requirement for the Project Research Scientist-II position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate is expected to design and synthesize a library of analogues towards the development of new drug candidates for Tuberculosis treatment using multi-step organic synthesis and characterization techniques.
